records.question: Which stations have at most 13 platforms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.number_of_platforms <= 13
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where number_of_platforms <= 13 limit 5;
records.thought: The query needs to filter stations based on the number of platforms, selecting only those with 13 or fewer platforms. The result will include the station_id and limit the output to 5 records.

records.question: Which station named London Waterloo has exactly 19 platforms, exactly 9.489 annual interchanges, and main services on the South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.number_of_platforms = 19 AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where name like '%london waterloo%' and number_of_platforms = 19 and annual_interchanges = 9.489 and main_services like '%south western main line%' and main_services like '%west of england main line%' limit 5;
records.thought: The query needs to filter the station based on the specified name, number of platforms, annual interchanges, and main services. It will then select the station_id from the station table.

records.question: Which stations in London on the Brighton Main Line have at most 26.892 total passengers and are served daily at 04:20 by the Parasuram Express?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.location = 'London' AND station.main_services = 'Brighton Main Line' AND station.total_passengers <= 26.892 AND train.name = 'Parasuram Express' AND train.time = '04:20' AND train.service = 'Daily'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station join train_station on station.station_id = train_station.station_id join train on train_station.train_id = train.train_id where station.location like '%london%' and station.total_passengers <= 26.892 and train.name like '%parasuram express%' and train.time = '04:20' limit 5;
records.thought: To find the stations in London on the Brighton Main Line with specific passenger limits and train service times, I will join the station and train_station tables, filter by total passengers and train schedule, and limit the results to 5 entries.

records.question: Which stations have an annual entry and exit of at most 26.639?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.annual_entry_exit <= 26.639
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where annual_entry_exit <= 26.639 limit 5;
records.thought: The query needs to filter stations based on the annual entry and exit value, selecting only those with a value of 26.639 or less. The result will include the station_id and limit the output to 5 records.

records.question: Which stations have at least 103.534 total passengers and are served by the Ananthapuri Express where the time is 17:15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.total_passengers >= 103.534 AND train.time = '17:15' AND train.name = 'Ananthapuri Express'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station join train_station on station.station_id = train_station.station_id join train on train_station.train_id = train.train_id where station.total_passengers >= 103.534 and train.name like '%ananthapuri express%' and train.time = '17:15' limit 5;
records.thought: To find the stations with at least 103.534 total passengers served by the Ananthapuri Express at 17:15, I will join the station and train_station tables with the train table, applying the necessary filters on total passengers and train details.

records.question: Which stations named London Charing Cross in London serve the South Eastern Main Line, have at least 6 platforms, annual interchanges of 1.99 or more, annual entry and exit of 38.005 or more, and total passengers exactly 39.995?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.main_services = 'South Eastern Main Line' AND station.annual_interchanges >= 1.99 AND station.annual_entry_exit >= 38.005 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 6 AND station.location = 'London' AND station.name = 'London Charing Cross' AND station.total_passengers = 39.995
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where name like '%london charing cross%' and location like '%london%' and number_of_platforms >= 6 and annual_interchanges >= 1.99 and annual_entry_exit >= 38.005 and total_passengers = 39.995 limit 5;
records.thought: The query needs to filter stations based on specific criteria including name, location, number of platforms, annual interchanges, annual entry and exit, and total passengers. The conditions will be applied in the WHERE clause to ensure only the relevant stations are selected.

records.question: Which stations named London Waterloo located in London have at most 103.534 total passengers, at least 94.046 annual entry and exit, exactly 9.489 annual interchanges, at least 19 platforms, and whose main services are South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.total_passengers <= 103.534 AND station.annual_entry_exit >= 94.046 AND station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 19 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line' AND station.location = 'London'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where name like '%london waterloo%' and location like '%london%' and total_passengers <= 103.534 and annual_entry_exit >= 94.046 and annual_interchanges = 9.489 and number_of_platforms >= 19 and main_services like '%south western main line%' and main_services like '%west of england main line%' limit 5;
records.thought: The query filters stations based on specific criteria related to their name, location, total passengers, annual entry and exit, annual interchanges, number of platforms, and main services. It selects the station_id of those that meet all the conditions.
